summary: Complete Phase 2 testing - All features verified working: 2FA brute force protection with account lockout, Stripe payment lookup/refund endpoints, PaymentsSection UI with 3 tabs (Resumen, Buscar Pago, Registro de Operaciones), and footer updated to Manoprotect.com.
verified_features: 2FA Brute Force Protection - After 5 failed attempts, account gets locked for 15 minutes (HTTP 429)
2FA Brute Force Protection - Error messages show remaining attempts count (e.g., 'Te quedan 4 intentos')
2FA Brute Force Protection - Locked account shows retry time in error message
Stripe Payment Lookup - GET /api/enterprise/admin/payments/:id requires auth (401 without)
Stripe Payment Lookup - Returns proper error for invalid payment IDs
Stripe Refund - POST /api/enterprise/admin/payments/:id/refund requires auth (401 without)
Stripe Refund - Validates reason length (min 5 chars) with 422 error
Stripe Refund - Restricted to admin/finance roles (role-based access control)
Payment Logs - Returns paginated logs with total count
Footer in EnterpriseLogin.js shows '© 2026 ManoProtect - Manoprotect.com. Todos los derechos reservados.'
PaymentsSection UI has 3 tabs: Resumen (Overview), Buscar Pago (Payment Lookup), Registro de Operaciones (Logs)
PaymentsSection tab navigation works correctly with proper tab highlighting
critical_code_review_comments: 2FA brute force protection (lines 186-300 in enterprise_portal_routes.py) correctly implements MAX_2FA_ATTEMPTS=5 and LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES=15
Failed attempts counter resets after successful login or lockout expiration
Stripe payment lookup (GET /admin/payments/:id) validates both PaymentIntent and Charge IDs
Refund endpoint has rate limiting (max 10 refunds per employee per hour)
All Stripe operations create audit logs in payment_logs collection
PaymentsSection UI (lines 2454-2800 in EnterprisePortal.js) properly implements 3 tabs with role-based visibility
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing CEO account with 2FA enabled.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully implemented and tested. 2FA brute force protection locks accounts after 5 failed attempts. To reset 2FA lockout for testing, run: db.enterprise_employees.updateOne({email: 'ceo@manoprotect.com'}, {$set: {two_factor_failed_attempts: 0}, $unset: {two_factor_lockout_until: ''}}). Stripe payment lookup/refund requires valid Stripe payment IDs (pi_xxx or ch_xxx). PaymentsSection UI shows 3 tabs when user has view_payments permission.
notes: Old company name 'STARTBOOKING SL' still appears in legal pages (TermsOfService, LegalNotice, PrivacyPolicy, LandingFooter) which is expected as those are legal documents. Enterprise Login page footer correctly shows 'Manoprotect.com' per requirements.
